title: Mana Liquidizer
description: A mod that allows you to turn mana into and from mana fluid, which allows a lot of possibilities!
body:
First of all, make sure to join my discord server if you want! There you'll find news about almost anything I am doing!

Link : https://discord.gg/JZ8H3fryaB

Now back to the mod. This mod is a basic mod that allows you to turn mana into mana fluid (and vice versa!) through a block called the Mana Liquidizer, basically point a spreader towards the Mana Liquidizer and see the magic happen! If the mode is "To Mana" (as in the arrow points at the tablet) then mana fluid will be transferred into mana and vice versa.

Now when you have some mana fluid, you can bucket/pipe it out. Also, the mana inside the liquidizer can get extracted with a spreader (and other mana extraction methods).

Now, what's the point? you might ask. Good question, this adds LOTS of possibilities with some set up, you can now have interdimensional-mana, or carry on mana from a place in your base to another, and you can also make Mana out of ANYTHING, let's say, for example, you made it so that you get 1 mana bucket out of 9 diamonds, with that mana bucket you can make 1000 mana out of it. To do that simply put it into a Liquidizer, set its mode to "To Mana" and extract that mana with a spreader, now you can do this proccess but the opposite way, you can now make it so you get 9 diamonds out of 1 mana bucket.

It's just all about how well you're going to use this!

Special features this mod adds :
- All said above!
- The ability to change the ratio of the mana to fluid/fluid to mana conversion (aaronhowser1)
- The ability to replace the fluid needed for the conversion to happen, whether you're converting fluid to mana or the opposite way, this is made so that you can use other mod's fluid (Like Wizardy's) or even your custom-made fluid! (HipHopHuman)
- The ability to make the conversion 1 way only (Through config only! It's not a default design), which will only allow you to either convert from mana to fluid only or vice versa (HipHopHuman)

 

There're also MANY planned features, including :
 - Change the default recipe
 - Make a better looking model for this
